How to use this service.description: Guide to setting up multiple SMTP relay enrollments

Tutorial.description: Step-by-step tutorial: enroll, save the SMTP password as a customer secret, send your first email

host.description: SMTP host (default: mailpit.svcmarket.com — the platform's mailpit testing sink, accepts any mail without authentication). For production: smtp.gmail.com, smtp.sendgrid.net, email-smtp.us-east-1.amazonaws.com, etc.

password_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding the SMTP password (app-password / API key). Defaults to `SMTP_RELAY_PASSWORD` — the name the non-plus `smtp-relay` uses — so empty-params enrollments share the seller-seeded testing secret. Override to a per-enrollment name to bind a different key.

port.description: SMTP port (default: 1025 for mailpit; 587 for STARTTLS; 465 for TLS).

tls.description: Whether to issue STARTTLS on the upstream connection (default: false for the mailpit testing sink). Set true for real SMTP providers (Gmail, SendGrid, SES).

username.description: SMTP username (default: empty for mailpit; usually your sending address or an API username).
